content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Provides structured, engaging mini-lessons without overwhelming students.
• Breaks up complex discussions with micro-learning moments.

📜 3. The Risk vs. Reward System – Student Decision Paths & Consequences

📜 All choices now have pros and cons, encouraging risk-taking but with real consequences.
✔ Mastery Exam selection impacts final assignment erasure.
✔ Redemption paths force ethical dilemmas.
✔ Final XP payout ties directly to success in the course.

Mastery Exam Risk & Reward Structure

✔ Once a student commits to Mastery Exams, they must attempt all three.
✔ They select difficulty levels per exam, each with increasing rewards.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 128 (chunk 128/555)
